creator: sdalu@sdalu.com
text:
Got the same on 13.0-RELEASE-p4 with firefox-101.0_2,2
Package build on poudriere with 
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CANBERRA
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DBUS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=FFMPEG
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LIBPROXY
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LTO
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PROFILE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=TEST
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=ALSA
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=JACK
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PULSEAUDIO
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SNDIO
